title: CANNABIS WORKER RESILIENCE PROJECT - 211info
text: NOWIA UNETE CANNABIS WORKER RESILIENCE PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with filing claims for unpaid wages, legal assistance, mental health supports, temporary lodging, food boxes and vouchers, clothing, and relocation assistance. 607 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Individuals who are employed in the illegal marijuana industry Hours: Monday-Friday noon-3pm and 4pm-7pm Email (541) 840-9669 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 840-9669 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to make appointment. While walk ins will be accepted, it is strongly urged to make an appointment. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Entrance off Mistletoe Street Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Agricultural Laborers Food Pantries * Agricultural Laborers Food Vouchers * Agricultural Laborers General Clothing Provision * Agricultural Laborers General Legal Aid * Agricultural Laborers Relocation Assistance * Agricultural Laborers Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - FAMILIAS ESPECIALES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH INSURANCE MARKETPLACE LEGAL SERVICES - ECO NAVIGATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NOWIA UNETE
